channel.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • MQTT TUIstars5 - Simple lightweight terminal based MQTT monitor and publisher.
  • MQTT-Tilesstars33 - MQTT-based IoT dashboard visualization tool. Allows easy dashboards sharing. Works with any MQTT broker supporting the WSS protocol.
  • VSMQTTstars1 - Simple MQTT client integrated in Visual Studio Code.

    • Telephony, PBX

  • sms2mqttstars2 - Docker Gateway to send/receive SMS through MQTT using an USB GSM dongle (gammu).

    • Misc

  • chrome2mqttstars14 - Python program to enable MQTT control endpoints for chromecasts (both audio and video).

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • aqara2mqttstars4 - Attach Aqara Smart Hubs to MQTT.
  • [can2mqtt] (https://github.com/c3re/can2mqttstars25) - CAN-Bus - MQTT Bridge (also works vice versa).

    • Community Resources

  • MQTT community wiki.
    • ESP
  • mqtt-ir-transceiverstars132 - ESP8266 based bidirectional gateway between MQTT and IR. Use with PlatformIO.

    • Makers

  • deskmatestars42 - A hackable & portable MQTT-powered mini dashboard and control center.

    • Broker

  • Ably - MQTT broker service and protocol adapter

    • Tools

  • mqtt_recorderstars5 - Simple cli tool for recording and replaying MQTT messages.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Firmwares for ESP based Devices
  • OpenMQTTGatewaystars2.2k - MQTT gateway for ESP8266, ESP32, Sonoff RF Bridge or Arduino with bidirectional 433mhz/315mhz/868mhz, Infrared communications, BLE, beacons detection, mi flora, mi jia, LYWSD02, LYWSD03MMC, Mi Scale compatibility, SMS & LORA.

    • Community Resources

  • mqtt.org.

    • Talks

  • Einführung in MQTT - Dominik Obermaier & Jens Deters, Building IoT conference 2016 (German).
    • ESP
  • mqtt-with-micropython - Connect to MQTT with micropython and wipy/others (ESP32 inside)

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • homekit2mqttstars295 - Interface between HAP-NodeJSstars2.5k and MQTT. Control MQTT connected devices with Siri or HomeKit Apps.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • mqtt-mirrorstars26 - Mirror MQTT traffic from one broker to another. Available as a CLI tool, helm chart or docker image.

    • Broker

  • Waterstream - MQTT broker leveraging Apache Kafka as its own storage and distribution engine.

    • Misc

  • MQTT Joystick Controllerstars5 - Open Source Android app that lets you control everything with your smartphone. Download it from Google Play.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Misc

  • mqtt-transformerstars3 - A simple service which consumes, transforms and periodically republish json messages on MQTT.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • mqtt-prometheus-message-exporterstars12 - A small service which will convert mqtt messages to prometheus metrics.

    • Broker

  • KMQTTstars20 - Kotlin Multiplatform MQTT broker, both embeddable and standalone.

    • Logging

  • mqtt2graphitestars71 - Archived! Instead use mqttwarnstars842 with carbon plugin.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Misc

  • MQTT.Cool - A web gateway that optimizes any MQTT broker when sending real-time data to web clients with automatic throttling.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • MQTT.Cool Test Client - A web interface for testing interaction between MQTT.Cool and any MQTT broker.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Visualization, Dashboards

  • MQTT-Hyperdashstars5 - A universal independent MQTT Dashboard for linux/Raspberry Pi.

    • Broker

  • Aedesstars1.1k - Barebone MQTT broker that can run on any stream server, the node way.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • mqtt-unifi-protect-bridgestars15 - Adding motion-status from UniFi Protect Cameras to MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Cloud

  • Adafruit IO - Adafruit IO is the easiest way to connect your project to the internet. You can easily connect your project to Adafruit IO with your device-of-choice by using your programming language of choice (we have lots of libraries) and control or monitor over the internet. Data stored with Adafruit IO is yours to manage and control.

    • Clients

  • MiniMQTTstars19 - MQTT Client Library for CircuitPython

    • Misc

  • mqtt-camera-streamerstars83 - Stream images from a connected camera over MQTT & view using Streamlit

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
ESP
  • ESP32-BLE2MQTTstars326 - BLE to MQTT bridge, exposes BLE GATT characteristics as MQTT topics for bidirectional communication.
  • ESP8266MQTTMeshstars235 - MQTT over mesh WiFi integrated library for ESP8266
  • esp_mqttstars1.1k - MQTT client library for ESP8266.
  • nodemcu-gpiomqttstars9 - Lua script to connect ESP8266 GPIOs to MQTT.

    • Clients

  • mqtt.dartstars45 - Dart MQTT client.
  • rumqttstars199 - A fast, lock free pure Rust MQTT client.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • ipcam2mqttstars16 - A small FTP server to receive movement images from ipcameras and turn them into MQTT alerts.

    • Misc

  • AlexaMqttBridgestars81 - Bridge between Amazon Alexa and MQTT.
  • buderus2mqttstars13 - Bridge between Buderus KM200 internet gateway and MQTT.
  • kobold2mqttstars1 - Bridge between Vorwerk Kobold Vr200 internet gateway and MQTT.
  • leaf-python-mqttstars21 - Extract data from Nissan Leaf API and post to MQTT.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • mqtt2highchartsstars57 - Plotting live numbered data from a subscribed MQTT topic using Highcharts.

    • Security, Encryption

  • Teserakt E4 - End-to-end encryption and key management for MQTT and other M2M protocols – Open-source and paid plans.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Firmwares for ESP based Devices
  • ESPEasy - Turns ESP into a multifunction sensor device for HA solutions with web-based configuration.
  • ESPHome - builds ESP8266/ESP32 firmware from concise YAML descriptions, uploads to and manages flashed devices.
  • Espurnastars2.5k - HA firmware for ESP8266-based devices with rich web UI and ≈120 devices supported out of the box
  • Sonoff-Tasmotastars15.2k - Firmware for ESP8266 devices with web-based configuration. ≈500 devices supported (not only Sonoffs).
  • WiFi-IoT - ESP8266/ESP32 firmware builder. Partly in Russian. Free features are limited.

    • Broker

  • Mosquitto - "The" Open Source MQTT Broker.
    • Free test server hosted by the Eclipse Foundation.
    • Authorization Plugin in Gostars230 supports many types of logins.
    • Let's Encrypt Mosquitto Docker Container makes it easy to encrypt.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Dec 9th - Dec 15th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • MQTT.fx - MQTT.fx is a MQTT Client written in Java based on Eclipse Paho. Supports scripting.
  • MQTTXstars978 - MQTTX is a cross-platform MQTT desktop client open sourced by EMQ, which supports macOS, Linux, and Windows.

    • Makers

  • Basecampstars251 - An Arduino library to ease the use of the ESP32 in IoT projects. See c't Magazin 2'2018 (German).

    • Logging

  • mqtt-firebase - A CLI tool for subscribing to MQTT topics and dumping them to a firebase firestore DB.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • Domoticz - Domoticz beta supports MQTT.

    • Smart Metering

  • bcontrol2mqttstars3 - Publish measurements from TQ Energy Manager / Busch-Jäger Energy Monitor to MQTT.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • Croutonstars273 - A dashboard that taps into your IOT network, using only MQTT and JSON.

    • Broker

  • EMQ Xstars7.8k - Scalable and Reliable Real-time MQTT Messaging Engine for IoT in 5G Era.

    • Misc

  • MQTT2ETCDstars2 - MQTT-ETCD gateway: PUT keys on ETCD through MQTT, and watch ETCD key changes on MQTT topics

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • MQTT CLIstars119 - A command line interface for connecting various MQTT clients supporting MQTT 5.0 and 3.1.1.
  • hivemq-mqtt-web-clientstars310 - Browser-based MQTT client that utilizes MQTT over websockets. Direct Link

    • Broker

  • HiveMQ - Java MQTT Broker that supports MQTT 3.1, 3.1.1 and 5.0. Commercial and open source editions available.

    • Clients

  • aiomqttstars47 - Async Python MQTT client based on paho-mqtt.
  • hivemq-mqtt-clientstars425 - High-performance Java MQTT client library with different API flavours for MQTT 5.0 and 3.1.1.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Aug 12th - Aug 18th, 2019
item.description:
Clients

  • CocoaMQTTstars1.1k - MQTT for iOS and OS X written with Swift.
  • emqttcstars255 - Asynchronous Erlang MQTT Client.
  • TMQTTClientstars18 - MQTT Client Library for Delphi.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • control-freak - IDE for IoT & friends. Built in MQTT support.

    • Tools

  • SimpleMQTT - A Slack app to send messages from Slack to MQTT brokers with slash commands.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 13th - May 19th, 2019
item.description:
Clients

  • MQTTnetstars2.1k - MQTT client and broker implementations in .NET.

    • Monitoring

  • mqtt2notifysendstars5 - Subscribe to a topic and show notifications from MQTT messages on Ubuntu & other notify-send compatible Linux distros.

    • Logging

  • mqtt2mongodbstars10 - Subscribe to MQTT topics and insert into MongoDB.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
Clients

  • gmqttstars206 - Python MQTT v5.0 client (asyncio-based).
  • luamqttstars71 - Pure-lua MQTT v3.1.1 and v5.0 client.
  • MIMIC MQTT Simulator - Simulate up to 100,000 MQTT clients per server for development/testing/deployment of IoT applications.

    • Platforms

  • mainflux - device management, data aggregation, data management, data analytics,connectivity and message routing and event management. Supported by Linux Software Foundation.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 1st - Apr 7th, 2019
item.description:
Messaging

  • mqttwarnstars842 - Subscribe to MQTT topics (with wildcards) and notify pluggable services.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • d3-MQTT-Topic-Treestars89 - A MQTT Topic Tree viewer using the d3 collapsible tree and MQTT over websockets.

    • Broker

  • Moquettestars1.8k - Java MQTT lightweight broker.

    • Tools

  • mqtt-malariastars244 - scalability and load testing utilities for MQTT environments.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • Homegear has build in MQTT support.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
Misc

  • Valetudostars2.2k - Xiaomi (Roborock) Vacuum Robots Firmware with MQTT and Webinterface.

    • Tools

  • MQTT Explorer - Tool to visualize your MQTT topics in a topic hierarchy, a MQTT swiss-army knife.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Clients

  • mqtt-statsstars3 - Subscriber client to monitor MQTT Topic Statistics

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 18th - Feb 24th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • mqtt_treestars4 - Displays all Topics in an expandable tree, helps to get an overview if you have a lot of clients publishing. (python, tkinter)

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 4th - Feb 10th, 2019
item.description:
Industry

  • spicierModbus2mqttstars25 - Modbus master which publishes register values via MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
Visualization, Dashboards

  • IoT OnOff - Configurable iOS/Android app.

    • Industry

  • OPC Router - MQTT Gateway (publisher/subscriber) with various plug-ins (OPC UA Bridge, SQL Bridge, REST Bridge, SAP Bridge)

    • Broker

  • MyQttHub - Cloud MQTT broker.
  • SurgeMQ - High Performance MQTT Server and Client Libraries in Go.

    • Location tracking

  • OwnTracks - Location tracking and geofencing for MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 7th - Jan 13th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • IoT-Testware - The Eclipse IoT-Testware is a collection of conformance test suites for IoT protocols enriched with additional tools for fuzzing and performance testing.
  • MQTT Boardstars49 - Open-source diagnostic-oriented MQTT client tool.
  • mqttclistars87 - MQTT Client for shell scripting.
  • MQTTInspectorstars67 - A general MQTT testing app for iOS (iPhone and iPad).
  • MQTTLens - A Google Chrome application, which connects to a MQTT broker and is able to subscribe and publish to MQTT topics.

    • Broker

  • hrottistars118 - A MQTT broker written in Go.

    • Clients

  • Machine Headstars57 - A Clojure MQTT Client.
  • Moscapsulestars256 - MQTT Client for iOS written in Swift.
  • mqtt_cppstars223 - MQTT client for C++14 based on Boost.Asio.
  • mqtt_lua - MQTT Client library for the Lua language.
  • mqtt-clientstars14 - A Polymer Web Component that implements a MQTT client (uses Paho mqttws31.js).
  • MQTT.js - MQTT client for Node.js.
  • mqttstars713 - MQTT Clients, Servers and Load Testers in Go.
  • mqttexstars46 - MQTT implementation in Elixir.
  • MQTTKitstars455 - MQTT Objective-C client for iOS.

    • Operating System

  • mqttlauncherstars150 - Execute shell commands triggered by published MQTT messages.

    • Logging

  • mqttcollectstars19 - A collectd "Exec" plugin for MQTT.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • mqtt2homekitstars22 - Roughly the opposite of homekit2mqttstars295: Control your HomeKit-enabled devices with MQTT and without Siri or iPhone.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • Home.Pistars190 is based on MQTT.

    • Home Entertainment

  • kodi2mqttstars73 - Interface between a Kodi media center instance and MQTT.
  • MQTT-DashCast-Dockerstars3 - MQTT Docker to launch DashCast session on Chromecast.

    • Misc

  • bt-mqtt-gatewaystars368 - Easily extensible Bluetooth to MQTT gateway, currently supports: EQ3 smart thermostat, Xiaomi Mi Scale, Linak Desk, MySensors and Xiaomi Mi Flora plant sensor.
  • Tasker (Automation for Android) MQTT Publisher Plugin.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • node-red-dashboardstars943 - A dashboard UI for Node-RED.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Misc

  • snowboy2mqttstars5 - Publish MQTT Messages on Snowboy Hotword Detection.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 8th - Oct 14th, 2018
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • knx-mqtt-bridgestars18 - ridges KNX and MQTT using the knx.js library.

    • Industry

  • CODESYS-MQTTstars44 - A MQTT client for CODESYS PLC

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Sep 17th - Sep 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Misc

  • gBridgestars153 - gBridge allows you to control (almost) any smart home device, any smart home software, with Google Assistant. Therefore, it transforms actions received from Google by voice commands to MQTT messages.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Broker

  • Mystiquestars17 - An extendable MQTT broker written in Go, with HTTP capabilities for observability. Implements MQTT v3.1.1.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Aug 20th - Aug 26th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • mqtt-clientstars9 - A Simple MQTT Client command line (Python) (use paho lib)

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Aug 13th - Aug 19th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • MQTT-PWNstars166 - MQTT-PWN intends to be a one-stop-shop for IoT Broker penetration-testing and security assessment operations.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jul 9th - Jul 15th, 2018
item.description:
Lighting

  • sunricher-wifi-mqttstars13 - control Sunricher LED devices using MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Telephony, PBX

  • sip2mqttstars23 - A SIP monitoring script that publishes incoming calls with CallerID to MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 21st - May 27th, 2018
item.description:
Talks

  • An Introduction to MQTT: Why HTTP isn't the King of the Internet of Things - Shinji Kim, Robert Bird - Akamai, Samsung Developer Conference 2017.

    • Lighting

  • Arilux_AL-LC0Xstars194 - This is an alternative firmware for Arilux LED controllers which uses MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 14th - May 20th, 2018
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • mcsMQTT - Plug-in for HS3 (HomeSeer).

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 7th - May 13th, 2018
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • homeeToMqttstars8 - Bidirectional Interface between homee and MQTT.

    • Tools

  • moxystars22 - A Golang MQTT proxy providing useful output traces to monitor and troubleshoot your MQTT communications.
  • mqtt-shellstars16 - A simple interactive shell for MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 30th - May 6th, 2018
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • zigbee2mqttstars5.8k - Allows you to use your Zigbee devices without the vendors (Xiaomi/TRADFRI/Hue) bridge/gateway.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Broker

  • Emitterstars2.8k - A distributed, scalable and fault-tolerant publish-subscribe messaging platform based on MQTT protocol and featuring message storage.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 2nd - Apr 8th, 2018
item.description:
Smart Home Integration Software

  • Home Assistant has a MQTT component.

    • Clients

  • MQTT-Cstars357 - A portable MQTT C client for embedded systems and PCs alike.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Architecture, Convention

  • The Homie Conventionstars593 - A lightweight MQTT convention for the IoT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Clients

  • mqtt-wrapper - Polymer Element that wraps other Elements and links them to MQTT topics.

    • Logging

  • mqtt2elasticsearchstars2 - Send MQTT messages to Elasticsearch.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • xiaomi2mqttstars25 - bridge between the Xiaomi Smart Home Gateway Aquara and a MQTT server.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Blogs

  • Jan-Piet Mens

    • Misc

  • node-mqtt-for-anki-overdrivestars52 - Node.js Controller and MQTT API for Anki Overdrive.
  • parrot-samplestars19 - Sample code which uses MQTT to control a Parrot AR Drone.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 5th - Feb 11th, 2018
item.description:
Misc

  • speedtest2mqttstars8 - Run speedtest-cli and publish results via MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Misc

  • unifi2mqttstars59 - Publish connected clients from Ubiquiti Unifi to MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 1st - Jan 7th, 2018
item.description:
Home Entertainment

  • sonos2mqttstars41 - A bridge between Sonos and MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Home Entertainment

  • mopidy-mqttstars17 - MQTT features for Mopidy.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Nov 6th - Nov 12th, 2017
item.description:
Clients

  • MQTT-Client-Frameworkstars1.7k - iOS, OSX, tvOS native ObjectiveC MQTT Client Framework.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Community Resources

  • A list of public brokers.

    • Clients

  • wolfMQTT - A client implementation of the MQTT written in C for embedded use. It supports SSL/TLS via the wolfSSL library.
  • Paho - Open source client implementations (C/C++, Java, Python, Javascript, Go, C#).
  • tcl-mqttstars5 - Small library to connect to a MQTT broker. Very, very basic.

    • Broker

  • Mosca - Mosca is a node.js MQTT broker, which can be used Standalone or Embedded in another Node.js application.

    • Tools

  • mqtt-utilsstars11 - A collection of MQTT utilities.
  • mqtt-wildcardstars14 - Node.js Module to match a MQTT Topic against wildcards.

    • Makers

  • arduinoTemps2mqttstars12 - Arduino sketch, grab One-wire Temperature's and publish to a MQTT broker.

    • Monitoring

  • notify-by-mqttstars12 - A Nagios/Icinga notification module which wraps data into JSON and fires it off to an MQTT broker.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • helios2mqttstars4 - A daemon for syncing a helios easy controls system like my KWL EC 220D to MQTT.
  • node-lox-mqtt-gatewaystars24 - Gateway for Loxone™ mini server to communicate with MQTT broker.

    • Home Entertainment

  • mqtt2tivoremotestars3 - Make TiVo DVR remote control available through an MQTT smarthome style interface.

    • Misc

  • homelystars14 - Collection of Go daemons for connecting Domoticz and other stuff.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Clients

  • Hulaakistars115 - An Elixir library for clients communicating with MQTT brokers.

    • Tools

  • mqtt-forgetstars7 - Command line tool to remove retained MQTT topics by wildcard.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • MMM-mqttstars14 - This is an extension for the MagicMirror². It provides the ability to subscribe to MQTT topics and display them.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • HS100toMQTTstars12 - Gateway between TPLink HS100/HS110 and MQTT.

    • Home Entertainment

  • htd2mqttstars3 - Bridge between an HTD Lync audio system and MQTT.

    • Misc

  • mqttclprostars82 - MQTT Client with tasker integration Android app.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Monitoring

  • nag2mqttstars5 - Nagios event broker to MQTT gateway.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Misc

  • mqttDBstars21 - A JSON store with MQTT interface.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Sep 4th - Sep 10th, 2017
item.description:
Operating System

  • WinThingstars101 - Remotely control Windows through MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • domiqttstars1 - Connects to a Domiq Base (LCN) and translate from and to MQTT.

    • Misc

  • miflora-mqtt-daemonstars434 - Linux service to send Xiaomi Mi Flora plant sensor data to an MQTT broker.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jul 31st - Aug 6th, 2017
item.description:
Home Entertainment

  • broadlink-mqttstars174 - MQTT client to control BroadLink RM devices.

    • Lighting

  • MQTT DMX Controllerstars38 - DMX Controller with MQTT support.
  • mqtt-dmx-sequencerstars16 - Headless counterpart to MQTT DMX Controllerstars16 - use scenes and sequences exported from the MQTT DMX Controller and control them via MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Broker

  • Vert.x MQTTstars119 - Vert.x component to handle connections, communication and messages exchange with remote MQTT clients.

    • Clients

  • Vert.x MQTTstars119 - Vert.x component that provides methods for connecting/disconnecting to a broker, publishing messages and subscribing to topics.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • smartthings-mqtt-bridgestars361 - Bridge between SmartThings and MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jul 10th - Jul 16th, 2017
item.description:
Blogs

  • Nick O'Leary

    • Broker

  • esp_uMQTT_brokerstars209 - A basic MQTT Broker on the ESP8266.

    • Scripting

  • Node-RED - A visual tool for wiring the Internet of Things.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jun 12th - Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Visualization, Dashboards

  • Linear MQTT Dashboardstars50 - Easy, customizable control panel - MQTT-client.

    • Lighting

  • hue2mqtt.jsstars22 - Interface between the Philips Hue bridge and MQTT.

    • Blogs

  • Ben Hardill
  • Dominik Obermaier

    • Misc

  • mqtt2blestars26 - A way to bridge MQTT topics to BLE Gatt characteristics.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 22nd - May 28th, 2017
item.description:
Visualization, Dashboards

  • HelloIoTstars74 - HelloIoT is a MQTT client and dashboard application.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 15th - May 21st, 2017
item.description:
Misc

  • wlan-thermo-mqtt-addon - Addon for a popular DIY barbecue thermometer.
  • dashbutton2mqttstars16 - Publish Amazon Dash Button presses to MQTT.
  • flowerpower2mqttstars7 - Publish measurements from Parrot Flower Power plant sensors to MQTT.
  • haiku2mqttstars8 - A bridge between Haiku smart fans and MQTT.

    • Operating System

  • psmqttstars100 - Utility reporting system health and status via MQTT.

    • Lighting

  • chromoflex2mqttstars2 - Control Chromoflex USP3 RGB LED modules via MQTT.

    • Home Entertainment

  • yamaha-avr2mqttstars8 - A simple adapter for connection Yamaha AVR to MQTT.
  • mqtt2atlonamatrixstars0 - Control Atlona HDMI matrix switches with MQTT.
  • bravia2mqttstars12 - Control your Sony Bravia TV with MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 1st - May 7th, 2017
item.description:
Visualization, Dashboards

  • HOMR-REACTstars13 - A configurable MQTT Visualization.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Lighting

  • h801/mqtt - Alternative firmware for the H801 LED dimmer that uses MQTT as a control channel.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Logging

  • graylog-plugin-mqttstars12 - MQTT Input Plugin for Graylog.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • hm2mqtt.jsstars20 - Interface between EQ-3's Homematic line of smarthome devices and MQTT. Supports Homematic IP.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
Lighting

  • TRADFRI2MQTTstars78 - MQTT Bridge for IKEA TRÅDFRI Light Gateway.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Clients

  • mqtt-rsstars133 - MQTT protocol library for Rust.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • aqara-mqttstars84 - Aqara (Xiaomi) Gateway to MQTT bridge.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • MQTT Dash - Android App: With the app you can create dashboards for your MQTT enabled IoT Smart Home devices and applications.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Home Entertainment

  • harmony-apistars352 - A simple server allowing you to query/control multiple local Harmony Home Hubs over HTTP or MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Smart Home Integration Software

  • Node-RED - A visual tool for wiring the Internet of Things, has native MQTT Support.
  • openHAB has a MQTT binding.

    • Makers

  • MySensors - Arduino NRF24L01 based sensor network with support for an MQTT gateway

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Logging

  • mqtthandlerstars18 - A Python logging handler module for MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Dec 26th - Jan 1st, 2016
item.description:
Home Entertainment

  • chromecast-mqtt-connectorstars31 - Control your Google Chromecast devices using MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • Wireshark-MQTTstars82 - MQTT dissector for Wireshark.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Nov 21st - Nov 27th, 2016
item.description:
Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • Evohome2mqttstars5 - MQTT Interface for the Honeywell Evohome system.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • mqtt-wallstars35 - Subscription only web-based client – like Twitter wall for MQTT.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • imqttstars20 - Interactive MQTT packet manipulation shell based on IPython.
  • Python MQTT Client Shellstars26 - a text console-based, interactive shell for exercising various tasks associated with MQTT client communications.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Operating System

  • mqttpcstars8 - Control processes via MQTT. Ability to send signals via MQTT and to publish stdout/stderr or pipe MQTT payloads into stdin.
  • mqttwatchdirstars31 - Recursively watch a directory for modifications and publish file content to an MQTT broker.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Home Entertainment

  • lgtv2mqttstars73 - Interface between LG WebOS Smart TVs and MQTT.
  • VLC MQTT Module - Control VLC via MQTT.
  • xbmc2mqttstars5 - A simple plugin for XBMC to listen for a particular topic on an MQTT broker, and display a popup message.

    • Clients

  • mqtt-elementsstars25 - Polymer elements for MQTT.
  • Mosquitto-PHPstars453 - A wrapper for the Mosquitto MQTT client library for PHP.

    • Scripting

  • mqtt-scriptsstars40 - Node.js based script runner.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • knx2mqttstars33 - Interface between the KNX home automation standard and MQTT.

    • Broker

  • ActiveMQ - A fast Java multiprotocol messaging and Integration Patterns server.
  • RabbitMQ - RabbitMQ offers a MQTT Adapter.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • FHEM has a MQTT module since V5.6.
  • pimatic has a MQTT plugin.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Visualization, Dashboards

  • mqtt-svg-dashstars54 - Subscribe to MQTT, extract JSON from a message and make lights blink on an SVG page.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Mar 28th - Apr 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Broker

  • VerneMQ - an Apache2 licensed distributed MQTT broker, developed in Erlang.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • mqtt-adminstars107 - Web based MQTT frontend. Direct Link.

    • Makers

  • RFM69-MQTT-clientstars81 - Arduino RFM69 based sensors and MQTT gateway.

    • Industry

  • mqtt2opcuastars64 - Bi Directional MQTT to OPCUA Bridge.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2016
item.description:
Broker

  • hbmqttstars683 - Python MQTT broker using asyncio.

    • Clients

  • hbmqttstars683 - Python MQTT client using asyncio.
  • ruby-mqttstars466 - Pure Ruby gem that implements the MQTT protocol.

    • Messaging

  • mqtt-irc-botstars18 - A MQTT to IRC / IRC to MQTT bridge or bot.

    • Community Resources

  • Google Groups: MQTT.
  • IRC channel #mqtt on the freenode network.

    • Tools

  • mqtt-benchmarkstars121 - A benchmarking tool for MQTT Servers.
  • mqtt-fuzzstars53 - A simple fuzzer for the MQTT protocol.
  • mqtt-spy - Java based MQTT frontend. Supports scripting.

    • Makers

  • xbee2mqttstars22 - XBee to MQTT gateway.

    • Telephony, PBX

  • agi-mqttstars32 - Interface between Asterisk and MQTT.
  • fritz2mqttstars7 - Connect FRITZ!Box to MQTT.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • mqtt-dss-bridgestars4 - MQTT digitalSTROM-Server Bridge.

    • Smart Home Integration Software

  • ioBroker has a MQTT adapterstars31.

    • Home Entertainment

  • lirc2mqttstars17 - Send and receive infrared via LIRC.

    • Architecture, Convention

  • mqtt-smarthomestars362 - Smart home automation with MQTT as the central message bus - Architectural proposal.

item.title: hobbyquaker/awesome-mqtt Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2015
item.description:
Clients

  • pubsubclientstars3k - A client library for the Arduino Ethernet Shield that provides support for MQTT.

    • Scripting

  • logic4mqttstars15 - Java based Logic and scripting engine for use with MQTT. Uses Java's general scripting interface, so scripts can be written in a multitude of languages like Javascript, Groovy etc.

    • Makers

  • pubsubclientstars3k - A client library for the Arduino Ethernet Shield that provides support for MQTT.
  • rpi2mqttstars18 - Connect a RaspberryPis GPIOs and 1-Wire Temperature Sensors to MQTT.

    • Operating System

  • mqtt-os-statusstars16 - Operating-system related data, published to an MQTT broker at fixed intervals.

    • Monitoring

  • check-mqttstars48 - A Nagios/Icinga plugin for checking connectivity to an MQTT broker.

    • Logging

  • influx4mqttstars28 - Subscribe to MQTT topics and insert into InfluxDB.

    • Smart Home Hardware Interfaces

  • cul2mqttstars10 - Interface between Busware CUL (868MHz RF-Devices like ELV FS20, HMS, EM, ...) and MQTT.
  • eno2mqttstars9 - Interface between an Enocean USB300 (TCM310) adapter and MQTT.

    • Home Entertainment

  • airtunes2mqttstars41 - MQTT controlled Multi-Room Audio with Airplay/Airtunes Devices.
  • onkyo2mqttstars22 - Interface between Onkyo AVR's EISCP network remote protocol and MQTT. Uses the onkyo-eiscp library.

    • Messaging

  • twitter-to-mqttstars15 - A python daemon that uses the Twitter Streaming API to access tweets and republishes them to an MQTT topic.

    • Visualization, Dashboards

  • mqtt-panelstars326 - A web interface for MQTT.
